description.value:
Mystic

The Mystic is a psyker who has embraced their gift — or curse — and seeks to master the dangerous powers of the Warp. Whether they manifest their abilities through visions, telekinesis, pyromancy, or telepathy, the Mystic walks a razor's edge between power and damnation. They are invaluable for their supernatural abilities but are always a potential liability, for the Warp is fickle and its gifts come at a terrible price.

Role Aptitudes

Defence, Intelligence, Knowledge, Perception, Willpower

Role Talent

Resistance (Psychic Powers) or Warp Sense

Role Bonus

Stare into the Warp: A Mystic gains the Psyker aptitude. In addition to the normal uses of Fate Points, a Mystic may spend a Fate Point to automatically pass a Focus Power Test with a number of Degrees of Success equal to their Willpower Bonus.

specialAbilities.name: Stare into the Warp
specialAbilities.description: A Mystic gains the Psyker aptitude. In addition to the normal uses of Fate Points, a Mystic may spend a Fate Point to automatically pass a Focus Power Test with a number of Degrees of Success equal to their Willpower Bonus.
